allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix multi-file upload: remove broken @st.cache_data on parse_uploads

The @st.cache_data decorator with the _files underscore convention told
Streamlit to skip hashing the only argument, making the cache key constant.
This caused the first parse result to be returned forever, so uploading a
second file still showed "1 run loaded" and compare mode never activated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Include all uploaded runs in PDF export

Previously generate_pdf\(\) received only the best-scoring run, so the
downloaded report always contained a single run even when multiple files
were uploaded. Refactored into _pdf_add_run\(\) helper called in a loop
so every run gets its own section \(metadata, KPIs, charts\) on a
separate page.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(python -c "import subprocess; subprocess.run\([''taskkill'', ''/F'', ''/FI'', ''IMAGENAME eq python.exe'', ''/FI'', ''WINDOWTITLE eq *streamlit*''], capture_output=True\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import py_compile; py_compile.compile\(''ui_operator.py'', doraise=True\); print\(''ui_operator.py: OK''\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import py_compile; py_compile.compile\(''run_insights.py'', doraise=True\); print\(''run_insights.py: OK''\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from ui_operator import show_operator_mode, evaluate_formation, evaluate_floc_size, evaluate_settling, evaluate_overall, recommend_action, compare_runs, plot_diameter_simple; print\(''All ui_operator imports OK''\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import py_compile; py_compile.compile\(''run_insights.py'', doraise=True\); py_compile.compile\(''ui_operator.py'', doraise=True\); print\(''OK''\)")

Bash(py -c "import metric_help; print\(''metric_help OK''\); from metric_help import METRIC_HELP, classify_flag; print\(f''{len\(METRIC_HELP\)} metrics, classify_flag works:'', classify_flag\(''Duplicate timestamps detected''\)[''severity'']\)")
Bash(py -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\(''run_insights.py'', encoding=''utf-8''\).read\(\)\); print\(''run_insights.py syntax OK''\)")
Bash(py -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\(''metric_help.py'', encoding=''utf-8''\).read\(\)\); print\(''metric_help.py syntax OK''\)")
Bash(timeout 15 py -m streamlit run run_insights.py --server.headless true --server.port 8503)
